## Summary

- What changed:
- Why:

## Definition of Done (CMS)

- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] `npm run check:toolchain` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## Accessibility checklist (Admin / Editor UI)

- [ ] Forms and controls can be used with keyboard
- [ ] Labels and validation feedback are clear for editors
- [ ] Icons and media have accessible labels/alt text where applicable
- [ ] Color is not the only way status/error is communicated
- [ ] New UI keeps semantic structure and focus visibility

## Performance / operational budget

- [ ] Build time and startup impact were checked (no unbounded plugin/script additions)
- [ ] Added dependencies are justified and minimal
- [ ] Any heavy background job or query includes pagination/limits and failure handling

## Validation notes

- Commands run:
- Manual checks done:
- Evidence links:
